reasoning: The resolution criteria strictly require any 1-minute candle on Binance BTC/USDT to have a low under $100,000 between July 14, 2025 and Dec 31, 2025. There are no stipulations that BTC must first reach $100k. Hence, if BTC is trading below $100k on July 14, the market immediately resolves YES on the first candle. Even if BTC is above $100k by July 14, the natural volatility of crypto practically guarantees a retest or drop beneath that support level over a 5.5 month period unless BTC aggressively moons and maintains a level well above (e.g., $150k+). Therefore, the marginal probability of witnessing at least one sub-$100k candle in that timeframe is extremely high. Given the lack of search tools to see real-world conditions on the cutoff date, my prior strongly favors YES with near certainty. I am capping at 0.95 per platform instructions.
